name: On Occlusions in Video Action Detection: Benchmark Datasets And Training Recipes
summary: arXiv:2410.19553v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper explores the impact of occlusions in video action detection. We facilitate this study by introducing five new benchmark datasets...
description: arXiv:2410.19553v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper explores the impact of occlusions in video action detection. We facilitate this study by introducing five new benchmark datasets namely O-UCF and O-JHMDB consisting of synthetically controlled static/dynamic occlusions, OVIS-UCF and OVIS-JHMDB consisting of occlusions with realistic motions and Real-OUCF for occlusions in real...
author: Rajat Modi, Vibhav Vineet, Yogesh Singh Rawat
